title: Jef's Better Bedwars - Jefwars
description: Makes bedwars so much more enjoyable!
body:
# **Bedwars is fun**

Makes bedwars even more fun! It looks terrable in other minigames though (except for bridge).

## **Items and blocks changed:**

![items and blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9cde22f2fcfe48790f809883ca2f076cab82193_0.webp)

I had made this texture pack for my own enjoyment, but now it's here!
